title: Buyer creates a PO, gets it approved, then amends quantity later — three journeys
user_persona: Buyer who realises mid-way they ordered wrong quantity

conversation.user: Create and approve a PO for SUP-300, USD, today, BUY-5, line ITM-12 100 units at 5. I have approval rights.

bot_must: fire POCRTMAINTRN4 (Create and Approve) — user has rights and asked for both

conversation.user: Wait, I need to bump that to 150 units.

bot_must: fire POAMDENTTRN1 (entry search) with the PO number from turn 1
warn that amend will move status to Draft and need re-approval

conversation.user: Amend and approve in one shot.

bot_must: report status Authorised, amendment number incremented to 1

evaluation_metrics.three_distinct_journeys: PoCrt (with TRN4) → PoAmnd, executing two TRANS commits
evaluation_metrics.context_persistence: po_number and line_no carried across journey switches
